prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref:
The image features a desk with two laptops placed on it. One laptop is positioned towards the left side of the table while the other occupies more space to its right. There are also three keyboards on the desk – one near each laptop and another closer to the center-right area. Additionally, there's a mouse located at the bottom-left corner of the desk.

The room appears to be an office or workspace, as evidenced by the presence of multiple computers and peripherals. Two TV screens can be seen mounted on the wall above the desks, providing additional display options for the users.
